modules.name: C# Data Access
modules.description: Connecting C# applications to relational databases using ADO.NET and Entity Framework Core. Covers database project setup, raw data access with ADO.NET, application configuration, ORM fundamentals with EF Core, database migrations, and stored procedure integration.

lessons.title: SimpleSchool Database Project
topics: Introduction to the SimpleSchool sample database
Project setup and database schema overview
Connecting a C# project to a SQL Server database
Overview of data access patterns in .NET

lessons.title: ADO.NET
topics: Parameterized queries and SQL injection prevention

lessons.title: Entity Framework Core
topics: Entity Framework Core overview and architecture
Querying with LINQ and EF Core

lessons.title: Entity Framework Migrations
topics: Managing schema changes in team environments

lessons.title: Stored Procedures
topics: Calling stored procedures from C# with ADO.NET
Calling stored procedures from EF Core

assessment.title: Module 7 Assessment
items: Build a complete data access layer for a C# application
Implement both ADO.NET and Entity Framework Core approaches
Configure database connections and application settings
Integrate stored procedures into the application
Demonstrate proficiency in C# database connectivity patterns
